title: MRunner Plugin Command Config
description: Configuration file for a single command within an MRunner plugin

title.description: Human-readable display name of the command

description.description: Short description of what the command does

icon.description: Icon name from MRunner's predefined icon set

mode.description: Execution mode: list returns a list of items, detail returns markdown content, action executes immediately

keywords.description: Additional search keywords to improve discoverability in the command palette
